The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for Mathrusri Ramabai Ambedkar Dental College and Hospital admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Mathrusri Ramabai Ambedkar Dental College and Hospital is approximately INR 383232 - INR 1118478.

faqs.question: Does Mathrusri Ramabai Ambedkar Dental College and Hospital has good and experienced faculty?
faqs.answer: Mathrusri Ramabai Ambedkar Dental College and Hospital has a Faculty review rating of 5 by students. This represents that Institute has decent, qualified and experienced faculty members.

faqs.question: Does Mathrusri Ramabai Ambedkar Dental College and Hospital provide good placement facilities?
faqs.answer: Mathrusri Ramabai Ambedkar Dental College and Hospital has received an impressive review rating of 3.33 on Placements based on 3 feedback of verified Shiksha students.

placements.overview: PG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year PG Degree, a total of 36 students were admitted at Mathrusri Ramabai Ambedkar Dental College and Hospital and 34 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 34 students 16 were placed with median salary of INR 540000. A total of 35 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year PG degree at Mathrusri Ramabai Ambedkar Dental College and Hospitaland 34 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 34 students 15 were placed with median salary of INR 540000.

faqs.answer: A:    The seats availability for offered courses at Mathrusri Ramabai Ambedkar Dental College and Hospital goes up to 144. Courses offerred by Mathrusri Ramabai Ambedkar Dental College and Hospital are approved by eminent Government bodies such as DCI.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Mathrusri Ramabai Ambedkar Dental College and Hospital provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in stream like Medicine & Health Sciences, and have a fee structure of around INR 3,83,232 to 11,18,478. UG programs include BDS. Further, the PG programs include MDS.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Great patient flow, and average infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Unfortunate, dental colleges don't have placements. But I can assure that M R Ambedkar Dental College would mould you into an amazing dentist. There is a great amount of patient flow that is more than enough for your everyday practice, more patients than most of the dental colleges in Bangalore.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not so great but the facilities for patient work and all is great. There's no compromises to that. There are ample amount of dental chair and equipments necessary for your practice and they let you use everything. Every equipment is in good condition.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, good patient flow.

review_content.Placements: Percentage of students in my batch 100. Average salary 20,000 Orthodontist, periodontist, prosthodontist, maxillofacial surgeon, pedodontist. Internship 50 the highest package - 30lakhs the lowest package- 50,000 Average- 15lakhs Top recruiting company - clove dental.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good and infrastructure is good. Clean classrooms, well ventilated labs, huge library. Quality of hostel is average. Hostel facilities, mess is okay and the canteen is worse. Sports once In a year, medical facilities available. Overall okay.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The college has sufficient infrastructure and good quality teaching.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements for dental courses anywhere in India, I guess. After passing out, you have to either set up a clinic or search for any job outside. It is a little difficult to find a job, but after few years, you can have a good future.
review_content.Infrastructure: Since the college was built in the 1980s, it lacks the recent hi-fi facilities as seen in the new colleges. The campus is small, including the hospital. Classrooms and library are good, and we have AC lecture halls. There is a hostel for girls, but not for boys. The college conducts an annual sports meet and other important meets. The college grants us permission to take part in the inter-college and inter-university sports and arts meet.

college_info.college_name: Shri Ram Institute of Pharmacy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The GPAT 2026 application form for admission to the MPharma course is expected to be released during the first week of April 2026.

placements.overview: Established in 2009, Shri Ram Institute of Pharmacy is located in Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh. The institute offers courses like B.Pharma, M.Pharma and D.Pharma. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 6 courses offered by the Institute are available across stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Not the best infra but best for education.

review_content.Placements: Only 15% of students were placed this year. The highest package is 3 Lacs in B.Pharma. 15% of students got internships. Top roles are offered at my college. No top companies came, but students were not prepared. Faculty members tried their best, but sometimes students faced partiality.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are average, not very good. Our pharmacy building is under construction. Labs are also not good, but okay. Classrooms are good. The exception is that hostels are not provided by the college. The canteen is very expensive, but its food quality is average. The games and sports facilities are excellent.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Review for my student life

review_content.Placements: From third semester students are eligible for campus placements. Pharma companies like Sanofi, Dr. Reddy' s Laboratories, Novartis, Lupin, Sun Pharma, Eli Lilly etc. The highest package is 28 lakhs per annum and the average package per company is 6 lakhs. Almost 75% of the students get placed, rest of them go for Phd's and business. My plan is to get placed in the upcoming campus placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: SRCT celebrate all kind of festivals like Ganesh Chathurthi, Saraswathi pooja, Navaratri, Christmas day celebration etc. NIPER also conducts SPANDAN every year in the month feb and march which include both the sports and cultutal activities. NIPER has wide range of accessiblity of books and jounals. It also has smart classrooms and seminar halls. NIPER has gym facilities, volleyball court , cricket ground, tennis court and shuttle court.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is best for study but not for other facilities.

review_content.Placements: In the 12th class, if the average in the first division is 65 or above then your admission is confirmed. The highest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. There is no rank of the company. Companies require the best communication skills and language for product selling.
review_content.Infrastructure: The library of our college is the best but sometimes, books are not available due to shortage of books. Students are delayed for study and preparing for exams. The canteen is average, not being specific. Facilities are best for studying.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good placements and good facilities.

review_content.Placements: About 40% to 59% of students get placed on our campus. According to their quality, the amount of the package is decided by them. Several companies have come to take the students. There are a large number of students who get internships from companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is good in the college. Wi-Fi facilities are available on the whole campus at high speeds. A huge library is also there. The conditions of the labs are good enough. There are no hostels available on the college campus, but there are many PG houses available near the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It has good teachers with excellent teaching quality but the infrastructure is average.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage is very low. According to the placement cell, hardly 2 -3 out of 300 students get placed. Top recruiting companies include local and regional selection pharma companies. Roles were based on placement cell and also the ability of the student whether he will be qualified for these positions or not.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has an average infrastructure. There are good labs. Wi-Fi is not provided in classrooms. The library is fine. Other facilities like food and canteen are available. Medical facility is not as expected. Sports and games are wisely provided. I am satisfied with it but still, some work is needed.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Shri ram institute of pharmacy. Jabalpur Madhya Pradesh.

review_content.Placements: Many companies came to our college for campus selection. Almost 60% of students get internship programs. The average salary package offered by companies till now is 5 LPA - 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi-enabled campus is available but the speed is slow. All labs are available such as the biochemistry lab, microbiology lab, chemistry lab, and some others. A library is also available and has all the required books. Hostel is not provided by the college. Outside the college campus, there are a lot of private hostels available at reasonable prices. It has a good environment for studies with great facilities.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Ram Institute of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Not the best infra but best for education.

content.Placements: Only 15% of students were placed this year. The highest package is 3 Lacs in B.Pharma. 15% of students got internships. Top roles are offered at my college. No top companies came, but students were not prepared. Faculty members tried their best, but sometimes students faced partiality.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are average, not very good. Our pharmacy building is under construction. Labs are also not good, but okay. Classrooms are good. The exception is that hostels are not provided by the college. The canteen is very expensive, but its food quality is average. The games and sports facilities are excellent.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review for my student life

content.Placements: From third semester students are eligible for campus placements. Pharma companies like Sanofi, Dr. Reddy' s Laboratories, Novartis, Lupin, Sun Pharma, Eli Lilly etc. The highest package is 28 lakhs per annum and the average package per company is 6 lakhs. Almost 75% of the students get placed, rest of them go for Phd's and business. My plan is to get placed in the upcoming campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: SRCT celebrate all kind of festivals like Ganesh Chathurthi, Saraswathi pooja, Navaratri, Christmas day celebration etc. NIPER also conducts SPANDAN every year in the month feb and march which include both the sports and cultutal activities. NIPER has wide range of accessiblity of books and jounals. It also has smart classrooms and seminar halls. NIPER has gym facilities, volleyball court , cricket ground, tennis court and shuttle court.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is best for study but not for other facilities.

content.Placements: In the 12th class, if the average in the first division is 65 or above then your admission is confirmed. The highest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. There is no rank of the company. Companies require the best communication skills and language for product selling.
content.Infrastructure: The library of our college is the best but sometimes, books are not available due to shortage of books. Students are delayed for study and preparing for exams. The canteen is average, not being specific. Facilities are best for studying.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good placements and good facilities.

content.Placements: About 40% to 59% of students get placed on our campus. According to their quality, the amount of the package is decided by them. Several companies have come to take the students. There are a large number of students who get internships from companies.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is good in the college. Wi-Fi facilities are available on the whole campus at high speeds. A huge library is also there. The conditions of the labs are good enough. There are no hostels available on the college campus, but there are many PG houses available near the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It has good teachers with excellent teaching quality but the infrastructure is average.

content.Placements: The placement percentage is very low. According to the placement cell, hardly 2 -3 out of 300 students get placed. Top recruiting companies include local and regional selection pharma companies. Roles were based on placement cell and also the ability of the student whether he will be qualified for these positions or not.
content.Infrastructure: It has an average infrastructure. There are good labs. Wi-Fi is not provided in classrooms. The library is fine. Other facilities like food and canteen are available. Medical facility is not as expected. Sports and games are wisely provided. I am satisfied with it but still, some work is needed.

paragraphs: Shri Ram Institute of Pharmacy admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Shri Ram Institute of Pharmacyoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.Pharma, D.Pharma and M.Pharma. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 47,900 - 1,48,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 2 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

hostel_campus.college_name: Late Smt. Hanjabai Gahlot Charitable Trust’s Gahlot Institute Of Pharmacy Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Navi Mumbai with good infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good and well-developed. Labs are well established in which a minimum of 30 students can sit. Classrooms are well managed with air-conditioners. Library has various books reliable to the subject and some books for reference purposes. Canteen is good. Our college provides 60 MB for every student.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides all facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilites are very good in our college. Labortaory, classrooms, and library are spacious. Different subjects have different laboratories in this college. There are two laboratory assistants for our help. Projectors are available in our classrooms for easy learning.

reviews.review_heading: Above average college for Pharmacy .
reviews.review_text: College provide practical laboratory with a good faculty members to give knowledge about practicals & although some of the equipments & machines are not working in our college. College provides a canteen area with good variety of food to choose from with a affordable prices.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Late Smt. Hanjabai Gahlot Charitable Trust’s Gahlot Institute Of Pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The college has excellent infrastructure. The college has four-storyed building, including a basement. The canteen and a few laboratories are in the basement. The college has two libraries for students. The book bank facility is available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for pharmacy.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Our college has a good building with all good quality facilities. It has air-conditioned classrooms and spacious libraries for diploma and degree students. Restrooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend students to take admission to this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. It is a four-storey building with a canteen and laboratories on the ground floor. The administration office is on the first floor. Classrooms are air-conditioned and well-lighted.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members and has value for money.
reviews.review_text: The canteen provided in our college is good. The infrastructure of our college is clean. Labs are well-equipped and can easily handle around 30 students. It has two spacious libraries with all the necessary books.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college for students.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is not provided in our college. It has a good library and average classrooms. Wi-Fi is not available. Meals served in the canteen which is available on the ground are good and cheap. Laboratories are not well-equipped. Lockers are provided in common rooms but the boys' common room is in poor condition.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has a well-furnished library. The library consists of 25 referred journals which include five international journals. Our college provides separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. Our college has canteen facilities for students and staff members.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our classrooms and laboratories are good and airy. Wi-Fi facility is not available in our college. The hostel facility is not available in our college. There are common rooms for boys and girls for sports and games where we can play carrom, table tennis, and chess.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely average college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are adequate. There are two libraries on the second floor of the campus, one for B.Pharma and other for d pharma students. College does not provide hostel facility, canteen is adequate, there is no boys common room there is girls common room and the college doesn't have its own ground.

reviews.review_heading: Get your degree in Pharmacy at affordable price with quality education.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very good and it is a ground plus three floors building having canteen at the base along with few laboratories and garden. First floor has staffroom, administration office and classrooms, other two floors have classrooms and library. Canteen is very average and good sports facility not available .

reviews.review_heading: Get your Diploma in good environment with less fees.
reviews.review_text: Talking about the infrastructure the building is nice. It is ground plus three floor building with canteen and laboratories at the ground floor. Administration office at first floor. The classrooms are located on first second and third floor. The classrooms are big, clean and having good ventilation. The labs are well-equipped. Canteen is below average, with minimum options and is not properly ventilated and not lit. No ground for sports and games. You have boys common room and girls common room...

reviews.review_heading: Placements were not soo good in 2022, Good teaching faculty, disappointed by the lab facility .
reviews.review_text: The library, classrooms, labs are all well maintained. Few the instruments actually don't work and they are less in number. The ground is also pretty well,. Canteen is okay kind with average food quality. The surrounding area is good the campus in not soo big.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty and a better fee structure than other colleges.
reviews.review_text: Despite having a small campus, the library, labs and classrooms are well maintained. There is no hostel facility. Boys' common room and girls' common room have indoor games facilities. The library has all the course-related standard books, and the librarian is good.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: Institute of Technology and Management, Gorakhpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Institute of Technology and Management, Gorakhpur.

content.Placements: Currently, 40% of students get placed. The average package is around 5-7 LPA. Recruiting companies that came this year for the campus placement drive are Streebro, Edvedha, Jaro Education, Wipro, TCS, Planet Park, etc. Many students are doing internships.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good. All classrooms are fully digital. There are AC classrooms and Wi-Fi. The hostel facilities are also good and the very best for girls.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. They are skilled in their subjects but some are freshers. They are very friendly and helpful. The course teacher makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are moderately difficult. If students prepare the subject very well, exams will be easy. Some faculty members of our college are nice.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: In the college, we can see the new experience and a unique environment, and teachers are cooperative

content.Placements: Placement in 2021 was 100%. The companies that came for placement were Cummins, Wheel India Ltd., Flipkart, etc. The lowest package for the placement was 160,000. The highest role for the placement was Jr. Engineer. Some students got their dream job as they required.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good. For the B. Tech course, the fee is 120,000. For the Polytechnic course, it will be around 100,000. The hostel provides breakfast. The food for every day is different. The feel of the hostel is not so high. The warden comes for regular checks in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: ITM Gorakhpur college Review.

content.Placements: Most of the students were placed in campus placements. The highest package was 900000 per annum last year and the lowest was 350000 per annum. Recruiting companies like TCS, Samsung, AWS, and many other small scale companies visit for mass hiring and many startup companies also approach the college. Students get a chance to do free internship training in 7th sem with different companies, like this year we did internship training with Samsung and 2 of our college students were in the toppers list and they were called to Delhi by fight and received 1lac cash prize+samsung laptop.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review about ITM GIDA GORAKHPUR.

content.Placements: The placement ratio of my college is 20%. The top recruiting companies are TCS and Infosys. Approximately 40% of students get internships with a stipend of 4000. The maximum package offered by my college is 8 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA. Other recruiting companies include Wipro and Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: The classes are well-equipped with smart class features and proper lab facilities. Wi-Fi is available for all students. The library is easily accessible and has a wide range of books. There are two canteens on campus offering hygienic food items. Medical facilities are adequate, and various sports like basketball, volleyball, table tennis, chess, and carrom are available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college.

content.Placements: Our college placements were not good. Only a few students were placed in college. Top recruiting companies did not visit our campus. Placements for other courses were so good. The highest salary package offered was 19 LPA and the lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had excellent facilities. The infrastructure was well-equipped. Wi-Fi was available throughout the campus. There were well-equipped labs and classrooms with projectors. Hostels were air-conditioned. The mess provided good food. Various sports activities were conducted in the hostel and premises. The canteen was excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Institute of Technology and Management, Gorakhpur.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. All classrooms are fully digital. There are AC classrooms and Wi-Fi. The hostel facilities are also good and the very best for girls.

reviews.review_heading: In the college, we can see the new experience and a unique environment, and teachers are cooperative
reviews.review_text:
College infrastructure is good.
For the B. Tech course, the fee is 120,000.
For the Polytechnic course, it will be around 100,000.
The hostel provides breakfast.
The food for every day is different.
The feel of the hostel is not so high.
The warden comes for regular checks in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: ITM Gorakhpur college Review.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is all over good and enough for students to grow there skills in a good environment with high spec techs. Smart classrooms, smart labs with Ethernet and Wi-Fi connection upto 1gbps. Hostel facility is also good as I myself don't live in hostel, I am a day scholar but what I have listened from my friends from hostel it is preety good and satisfying. Yes sports are also a part of our routine along with the academics and several inter and intra college sport competitions are conducte...

reviews.review_heading: Review about ITM GIDA GORAKHPUR.
reviews.review_text: The classes are well-equipped with smart class features and proper lab facilities. Wi-Fi is available for all students. The library is easily accessible and has a wide range of books. There are two canteens on campus offering hygienic food items. Medical facilities are adequate, and various sports like basketball, volleyball, table tennis, chess, and carrom are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: Our college had excellent facilities. The infrastructure was well-equipped. Wi-Fi was available throughout the campus. There were well-equipped labs and classrooms with projectors. Hostels were air-conditioned. The mess provided good food. Various sports activities were conducted in the hostel and premises. The canteen was excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Not so good and not so bad. Average college for average students with average package.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is pretty good in our college.
 Well-equipped labs with every required instruments.
Classroom are air conditioned.
Benches have good quality of wood.
Hostel life is awesome. 
Rooms are big and large.
Food is not so good. 
Medical facilities is available.
Canteen is available.
Sports accessories is available.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Gorakhpur for B.Tech course.
reviews.review_text: In ITM, there are many hostel facilities for both boys and girls separately.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Institute of Technology and Management, Gorakhpur.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available. The classrooms are air-conditioned. A library is available with all the required books. The infrastructure is good. A huge ground is available. The campus has good greenery. The hostel facilities are not good. Games and sports facilities are available. A mess and canteen are available. The quality of food is not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied due to management, which was not so good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good and all machines required for labs are present. Hostels have not so good facilities in terms of mess food, Wi-Fi connection and drinking water. But it has an average room with 24X7 electricity availability. Sports and gaming events are negligible.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very stunning and it's awesome as compared to other colleges in this area. Very good place, Wi-Fi available.Classroom with air conditioning. Lab with good facilities. Hostel rooms are so very good. The only problem is hostel food. Otherwise, the hostel is awesome.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with less fee and good education.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available here are canteen, hostel, transport, library and 24x7 internet. In our college hostel, the quality of facilities offered in the canteen and mess is above average. For sports and games, there are proper grounds and courts. There are emergency and normal medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college which only focuses on studies.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi enabled labs in our college are good. Classrooms are in bad condition. The entire campus is under CCTV surveillance. No water supply (clean water) facility. The sports facility is average. Only cricket and basketball are available here. The library is pathetic with no availability of the latest edition books. Canteen is average and lacks proper maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty, infrastructure, and environment of the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a Wi-Fi facility. There are labs for all departments of B.Tech and computer labs for B.Pharma. Even there is a room for medical emergencies equipped with all major medical equipment and medicines. There are smart classrooms enabled with Wi-Fi connection. There are hostels for both boys and girls with all facilities. There are playground and courts for sports like badminton, tennis, and football.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good enough. Free Wi-Fi facility was available on our campus. Classrooms, laboratory and libraries were good. The library had a good collection of books and magazines. Students were also encouraged to take part in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: It has the best infrastructure in Gorakhpur, and also the placements are very good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is huge compared to other colleges. It has all labs for all branches, and they are air-conditioned. Classrooms are well-furnished. The campus is lush green. The canteen is large enough to accommodate students and teachers.

highlights.summary: Kalyani University admissions 2025 are open for UG and PG courses. Candidates can check and apply for their chosen course by visiting the official university website. Find below a few more updates:

college_info.intro:
Kalyani University offers a range of courses in fields like Arts, Science, Commerce, Fine Arts, Engineering, etc. Ug level courses are offered for 3 or 4 years. Similarly, PG programmes are offered for a duration of two years. The popular programmes offered at University of Kalyani are BTech and MBA. The university offers BTech specilisation in CSE, Electronics & Instrumentation, Information Technology, and others. After successful completion of the programmes, students can explore their career as Software Developers, Computer Engineers, Data Analyst, Systems Analysts, IT Consultants, etc
MBA is another popular programme. The university also offers a 2-year MBA programme at the PG level. MBA programme includes industry interactions, group presentations, field projects, case study analysis, and company visits to develop the practical skills of the students. Students can check the Kalyani University courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

Many students looking for better jobs
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    The Kalyani University WBJEE Cutoff 2025 was published for admission to the BE/BTech courses. The cutoff was released for various categories in all rounds for the All India quota candidates. The cutoff was out in the form of opening and closing ranks. For the General AI category, the overall cutoff ranged from 2903 in the first round to 9567 in the last round. Among all the BTech specialisations, the most competitive for admission was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, with the cutoff ranging between 2903 and 5006, for the first and last round, respectively. Note: Other categories, rounds and courses will have different cutoffs accordingly.

faqs.question: Am I eligible for the MCA program at the University of Kalyani?

faqs.answer: A:    Hi...University does not officially conduct dedicated campus placement drives specifically for MCA students. Many current and past students report that there is no structured placement cell or regular on-campus recruitment for MCA — especially compared to engineering or large tech colleges.Some information even suggests that on-campus placement activity for MCA has been minimal or non-existent, and students largely have to seek jobs or internships on their own.
faqs.question: Is kalyani university really arrange placement opportunities for MCA students?

faqs.answer: A:    Kalyani University was founded in 1960 by the Government of West Bengal.The university has 62 affiliated colleges under its aegis in the districts of Nadia and Murshidabad. Kalyani University is a NAAC 'A' Grade institute and is recognised by the UGC and AIU. BTech is among the most popular courses offered at the University. The duration of the course is of 4 years. Multiple internship & placement opportunities are offered to the students in both government & private sector. It is definitly worth doing BTech from Kalyani University.
faqs.question: Is it worth doing BTech from Kalyani University?

reviews_list.review_title: My sweet college in Tehatta.

review_content.Placements: This is a well-known college in Nadia. Almost 80% students got placed in B.A. Honors in history. The average package varies from 3 LPA to 6 LPA. Various companies come to our college and select the best students for their companies. About 40% student gets an internship. Many students got selected as lecturers and assistant professors in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-designed, neat, and clean. There are CCTVs in almost all the classrooms. Digitally teaching equipment is also available. Everyone can get their necessary books related to their subjects in the library, which can help them. The hostel rooms are good. The food given in the hostel is hygienic. There are lots of opportunities in sports that students can avail themselves of.

review_content.Placements: The college itself doesn't provide any placement, but it conducts a lot of seminars related to placement, from which you can try to build a connection with the recruiter. The college, on its website, has an option for placement cell but whenever you try to contact them, they don't help.
review_content.Infrastructure: For geography, the infrastructure is not that good, the computer labs are not well structured, and the geography lab doesn't have all the instruments. The computer in the lab is not working properly. Teachers are very responsible for the curriculum of the course.

review_summary.college_name: Kalyani University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and academic environment, but the infrastructure can be improved.

content.Placements: English Honours is not a placement-oriented course in our college, so the percentage of students getting formal campus placements is very low. Most students either prepare for competitive exams or take up private jobs on their own. On average, 10-15 percent of students get some kind of job opportunity through the college's career cell or seminars.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the English honours department is decent and improving every year. Our classrooms are simple but well-maintained with proper seating and ventilation. The library is one of the best parts because it has a good collection of English literature books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: University of Kalyani review.

content.Placements: Companies are not coming to this college. This is only a government college, and there is nothing for placement. We have to suffer from a scarcity of placements. If you want placement, then you have to go outside for the company, and you will have to reach out by yourself to get that placement.
content.Infrastructure: I would say the college is good, but the infrastructure is not as good. The lab is also not well-maintained. The library is very good because it is a university library. Hostel facilities are decent, but the food quality is very bad. This is a government-funded university, so you get what is provided in government schools.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in History - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My sweet college in Tehatta.

content.Placements: This is a well-known college in Nadia. Almost 80% students got placed in B.A. Honors in history. The average package varies from 3 LPA to 6 LPA. Various companies come to our college and select the best students for their companies. About 40% student gets an internship. Many students got selected as lecturers and assistant professors in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-designed, neat, and clean. There are CCTVs in almost all the classrooms. Digitally teaching equipment is also available. Everyone can get their necessary books related to their subjects in the library, which can help them. The hostel rooms are good. The food given in the hostel is hygienic. There are lots of opportunities in sports that students can avail themselves of.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Geography - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Not satisfied with the faculty.

content.Placements: The college itself doesn't provide any placement, but it conducts a lot of seminars related to placement, from which you can try to build a connection with the recruiter. The college, on its website, has an option for placement cell but whenever you try to contact them, they don't help.
content.Infrastructure: For geography, the infrastructure is not that good, the computer labs are not well structured, and the geography lab doesn't have all the instruments. The computer in the lab is not working properly. Teachers are very responsible for the curriculum of the course.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in History - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Won't suggest anyone to take admission in this college.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed is 70%. The lowest and the average packages are 1.20 LPA and 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Amazon, and Adani Green Energy. The percentage of students who got internships is about 12%, I don't know. The top role is surveyor.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are average. Labs and classrooms lack modern equipment. Wi-Fi is slow and unreliable. Sports facilities are poor and not well-maintained. I am very satisfied with this college. In this hot summer, there are just 4 fans in our classroom. We have a decent room.

admission_process.title: Kalyani University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: The admission process of Kalyani University is inclusive of multiple steps such as registering on the official website or the website of the admission conducting body or exam. Followed by applications, students are required to go through the selection rounds.

After the selection rounds are over, course-wise counselling is conducted again by the admission conducting body or a final merit list is released by the university with the names of the shortlisted applicants. All these steps are mentioned below in detail:

STEP 1:Kalyani University Application Process 2026:For the courses offered by Kalyani University where admission is merit-based, applications can be completed online at the official website. Along with filling the application form, candidates are required to pay an application fee and submit the relevant documents on the admission portal.

STEP 2: Kalyani University Entrance Exams, Counselling and Other Selection Rounds:Followed by applications, students are required to go through the selection rounds. After the selection rounds are over, course-wise counselling is conducted again by the admission conducting body or a final merit list is released by the University with the names of the shortlisted applicants.

STEP 3: Kalyani University Merit List, Admission Offers and Seat Confirmation:After the completion of the selection rounds, course-wise counselling is conducted for the final seat allotment as per the intake capacity. The final merit list is released by the University with the names of the shortlisted applicants. Those interested in final admission can confirm their seat by paying for the admission fee.
Candidates who qualify for the Kalyani University admission process have to pay the fee for respective UG & PG courses.

Coming to affordability, it is among the causes of many people quitting college or their degree. Although the availability of student loans and scholarships has made education more affordable, qualifying for one of these loans or scholarships frequently comes with a set of requirements that must be met.
The details onKalyani University feesin addition to the average salary for the popular UG & PG courses are listed in the table below:
Note: *Candidates are requested to visit the official website to learn more about Kalayni University fees and seat intake in detail.

To secure a seat at the university, a candidate should obtain a good score on the entrance test or in the qualifying examination (whichever is applicable). Check out the below table to know in detail about course-wise seat intake at Kalyani University:

At Kalyani University, the reservation will be applicable as per the Government of West Bengal norms. ForPG programmes, there is an80% reservationin the seat intake for candidates who have graduated (Hons) in the respective subjects fromKalyani University.20% of seats are the candidates from other universities.
Note: The above information is taken from official sources.

faqs.question: Does Kalyani University offer MBA course?
faqs.answer: Yes, Kalyani University has been offering an AICTE-approved MBA course since 2001 under the Department of Business Administration. The university offers admission on a total of 58 seats. At Kalyani University, candidates get option to choose among the four specialisations depending upon the academic background and performance in the previous qualifying exam. faqs.question: What is the admission process of Kalyani University?
faqs.answer: Kalyani University admissions are both merit and entrance-based for respective UG and PG courses. For a few UG courses such as B.Ed, BSc, MA, etc., admissions are offered based on candidates' merit scores obtained in their previous qualifying exam. Further, to get admission to courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA, etc., candidates have to qualify for state/ national-level entrance exams. As per the admission process, candidates also have to appear for other selection rounds such as Group Discussion and Personal Interview rounds for the respective courses. Later on, the selected students are allocated seats via a counselling process as per the seat capacity. Read more about the detailed University of Kalyani admission process 2023,here.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Kalyani University?
faqs.answer: Kalyani University admission to most of the courses are offered via scores of various state/ national-level entrance exams. However, the university does not conduct any entrance exams on its own, but it accepts a few state/ national-level entrances conducted by West Bengal state. These include WBJEE, WB JECA, WB JEMAT, CAT, MAT, GATE, etc., for admission to BTech, MCA, MBA and M.Tech programmes. For courses such as BCom, BA, BSc, MA, etc., direct admissions are offered to candidates based on their scores obtained in the previous qualifying exam. For more details on Kalyani University list of accepted entrance exams course-wise,check out this link.

faqs.question: How to apply for BTech at Kalyani University?
faqs.answer: The Kalyani University BTech admissions starts with an online application process. Interestes candidates are required to check the minimum eligibility before applying for the course. To apply for BTech admissions, candidates must visit the official website of University of Kalyani and fill an online application form. Further, the also have to pay an application fee. placement_data.title: Kalyani University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The University has not released the placement report for the year 2025. However, NIRF report 2025 is available on the official website. As per the report, a total of 97 BTech students were placed during University of Kalyani placements 2024. The median package offered to BTech students was INR 6.96 LPA . Further, 240 PG (2-year) and 19 PG-Integrated students were placed during Kalyani University placements 2024. The median package for PG 2-year and PG integrated course stood at INR 9.30 LPA and INR 11 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: Which sector involves the largest share of University of Kalyani alumni?
faqs.answer: According to unofficial sources, a large share of the University of Kalyani alumni are working in the Education sector (19%), followed by Engineering (13%). The detailed sector-wise distribution of alumni is illustrated in the table below: Sector Percentage of Alumni Education 19% Engineering 13% Research 12% Operations 12% Business Development 11% Sales 11% Information Technology 10% Others 12% NOTE: The sectors involved in the ‘Others’ category are Administrative, Finance, Media and Communication, Arts and Design, Marketing, Customer Success and Support, Programme and Project Management, and HR.

faqs.question: How are the BSc placements at Kalyani University?
faqs.answer: Based on ‘Verified Students Reviews’ on Shiksha, BSc students of Kalyani University provide a mixed bag of reviews for BSc placements. Many reviews suggest that around 60% students get placed across different specialisations. According the reviews, the highest package stood at INR 9 LPA, while the lowest package offered was INR 3 lakhs. However, students suggest that some of the specialisations do not have many placement opportunities. Following are few quotes from verified Shiksha reviews: "92% of the students got placed. The highest package offered was INR 9 LPA, the average package was INR 6 LPA and, lowest package offered was INR 3 LPA" (BSc Hons in Geography- Batch of 2025) “The highest salary package offered was INR 8 LPA” (BSc- Batch of 2023) “Top roles offered are professors and other jobs in the health sector.” (BSc Hons in Physiology- Batch of 2025) “The average salary offered was INR 25,000 per month.” (Bachelor of Science (BSc Hons- Batch of 2023)

highlights.description: Consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies, Kalyani University is one of India’s top institutes. Recently, the institute ranked #51-100 in the NIRF 2025 under the State Public University category. The reasons for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies include its academic reputation, top-notch faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The following article covers all the information around Kalyani University rankings:

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, Kalyani University has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'State Public University' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is observable that in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, Kalyani University's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
Kalyani University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, Kalyani University fell 200 ranks to #1001 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a decreasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Kalyani University fell 67 ranks to #330 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Explore the Kalyani University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Krishnagar Government CollegeReviewed on 18 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and academic environment, but the infrastructure can be improved.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the English honours department is decent and improving every year. Our classrooms are simple but well-maintained with proper seating and ventilation. The library is one of the best parts because it has a good collection of English literature books.

reviews.review_heading: University of Kalyani review.
reviews.review_text: I would say the college is good, but the infrastructure is not as good. The lab is also not well-maintained. The library is very good because it is a university library. Hostel facilities are decent, but the food quality is very bad. This is a government-funded university, so you get what is provided in government schools.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Tehatta Government CollegeReviewed on 14 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My sweet college in Tehatta.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-designed, neat, and clean. There are CCTVs in almost all the classrooms. Digitally teaching equipment is also available. Everyone can get their necessary books related to their subjects in the library, which can help them. The hostel rooms are good. The food given in the hostel is hygienic. There are lots of opportunities in sports that students can avail themselves of.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Kalyani MahavidyalayaReviewed on 14 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: For geography, the infrastructure is not that good, the computer labs are not well structured, and the geography lab doesn't have all the instruments. The computer in the lab is not working properly. Teachers are very responsible for the curriculum of the course.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Kalyani MahavidyalayaReviewed on 11 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Won't suggest anyone to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average. Labs and classrooms lack modern equipment. Wi-Fi is slow and unreliable. Sports facilities are poor and not well-maintained. I am very satisfied with this college. In this hot summer, there are just 4 fans in our classroom. We have a decent room.

reviews.review_heading: It's a distinguished college because there are a lot of activities and fun.
reviews.review_text: The hostels, library, and instruments are all nicely maintained. The library room is fully air-conditioned, and the classrooms are under CCTV camera surveillance. All the safety and infrastructure are very good. There are nice canteens and a playing ground. Our course is very affordable for many students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 24 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Ranaghat College.
reviews.review_text: My college has Wi-Fi connection in the classrooms and library, which gives us many benefits. Our college has a canteen where good food is available. Our college has a medical facility. If something happens to someone, they are given medicine from there. Our college has a big field where we sometimes play sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 18 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well-developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs, and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained, and the environment is supportive of focused academic learning. The college fee is genuine.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 18 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well-developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs, and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained, and the environment is supportive of focused academic learning. The college fee is genuine.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 17 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs, and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained, and the environment is supportive of focused academic learning. The college fee is genuine.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 7 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is good in every aspect. I am happy to study at this college.
reviews.review_text: All the things are available in our college that are on your list. Our college has no hostal, so this is a bad thing. Our college should improve this thing so I request our faculty to create a new hostel for long distance students who study well, that's all I want in my school.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 7 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Why I prefer Ranaghat College.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well-developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained. The environment is supportive of focused academic learning. A new building is under construction.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Karimpur Pannadevi CollegeReviewed on 5 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has outstanding faculty, great infrastructure and strong placements since 2015.
reviews.review_text: The campus infrastructure is well-maintained with high-speed Wi-Fi in classrooms, labs equipped with the latest tools, and a central library with a vast collection of books and digital resources. Hostels are clean and secure offering basic amenities. It also provides 24x7 water and electricity facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Kalyani MahavidyalayaReviewed on 2 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Canteen is closed in our college. We hope they reopen the canteen again.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college. Students can use the Wi-Fi for their studies. Our college library is very peaceful and helpful to us. We can get books for our needs. We can sit and study in the library. There are computers in the library that we can use, which is helpful for us. Classrooms are nice. Labs are also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: University of Kalyani. Good learning and infrastructure in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, seminar hall, library, classrooms, labs, and canteen are present. Quality is nice, especially food is fresh. Medical facilities are present, and sports are available only to physical education department. Sports events are held, and active participation is observed.

college_info.college_name: Kalyani University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Kalyani University MBA fee is INR 70,000, which is a total tuition fee for two years. Candidates have to pay a tuition fee amount of  INR 35,000 for one year. Apart from this, students also have to pay for other one-time fee components such as Admission Fee, Library Fee, Sports Fee, Registration Fee, Identity Card Fee, Immigration Fee and Students-aid Fund.
Note: The above fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Kalyani University MBA fees.

At Kalyani University, the total tuition fee for a two-year B.Ed course is INR 7,200. However, this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Kalyani University B.Ed fee. Additionally, candidates also have to pay for other one-time fee components such as Admission Fee, Library Fee, Sports Fee, Registration Fee, Identity Card Fee, Immigration Fee and Students-aid Fund.

The tuition fee for a four-year BTech course at Kalyani University is INR 1.44 lakh. This fee is common for all BTech specialisations. Additionally, candidates also have to pay for other one-time fee components such as Admission Fee, Library Fee, Sports Fee, Registration Fee, Identity Card Fee, Immigration Fee and Students-aid Fund.
Note: The above fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Kalyani University BTech fee.

Yes, Kalyani university provides scholarships and fee waiver schemes to extend it support to deserving BSc programme students. Each scholarship is different to cater to varying needs of students. The BSc programme students can avail Scholarship for Talent Support, Akyashree Scholarship for Minority Students, Swami Vivekananda Merit-Cum-Means Scholarship, etc.

reviews_list.review_title: Best in academics, but extracurricular and sports aspects are poor.

review_content.Placements: There is nothing called placements in a medical college. After 5.5 years of the course, we can work in any private or government hospitals, and we can set up our own clinics, but we have to do it on our own. Placements don't make sense in medical colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious enough to accommodate 100 students, and the ventilation is nice. There is no A.C. or Wi-Fi facilities in classrooms or hospitals. The hostel buildings are old and quite insufficient, and the food in the hostel mess is not bad. There is no separate canteen available on campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good medical practice and staff.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in our course is around 80 percent. The college has good medical practice and facilities for clinical research. The highest average package offered is 25 Lacs and the lowest average package is 15 Lacs. The top roles offered are that of surgeons and scientists. The top hospitals visiting are Apollo and Osmania.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has the best facilities for the students to study and practice in the hospital. The college has great infrastructure with proper buildings, attached hospital for clinical practice, good labs, and hostel facility available. The sports are well encouraged.

Top hospitals for placements include Apollo and Osmania Hospital. The top roles are medical researcher and surgeon.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure, with proper buildings, classrooms, and labs. The college is attached to a hospital for practice, and hostel facilities are available. The library is very useful to students, and there are multiple sports grounds.

individual_reviews.title: Very dissatisfied with the faculty members.

content.Placements: Very few of the students were placed in my course. Most of the students started their ventures. The highest package was 14 lacs and the average package was 8 lacs, and the lowest package was 5 lacs. Many students got internships in several companies.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are of average size and not cleaned daily. The furniture of the classes is getting old and worn out. Wi-Fi facilities are available only to faculty members. The hostel rooms are average. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is acceptable.

reviews.review_heading: Our college environment is very good.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities in our college. The infrastructure is pretty good. Here, labs are well organized by college management. Classrooms are very good, with good ventilation. Camps are conducted every month. There is a college hostel facility. Beds are good in college hostels. The rooms in the college hostel are like our home.

reviews.review_heading: College has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college typically includes classrooms, libraries sports facilities and medical facilities, hostels. It would have specialized facilities like anatomy labs, dissection halls and simulation centers. Additional the college have recreational areas, cafe. The infrastructure is designed to support the academic research and residential needs of students and faculty.

reviews.review_heading: Everything in this college is extremely beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good placements.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with excellent placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided excellent infrastructure. The campus was huge. Many facilities were available. Classrooms were good. Labs were well-equipped. The hostel was good. Each room had an attached bathroom. Coolers and washing machine facilities were available. We had a common reading hall. The food in the canteen was good.

reviews.review_heading: This college gave me more that I expected.

college_info.intro: Empire College of Science popular programmes are MBA & BVoc. The MBA course gives Healthcare leaders the business skills that are needed to take on the challenges that are currently faced by the healthcare industry. MBA students can become Healthcare Administrator, Hospital CFO, Medical Practice Manager, etc. MBA students can go for PhD programmes or can even go for teaching career. These students can also go to abroad & complete their further education.Overall, it is one of the colleges offering quality education to student. The faculty who teach students are expert, professional, and quite skilled in their nature. Empire College of Science students find jobs in hospitals like Ansar Hospital, etc.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Empire College of Science offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose offline courses from plethora of streams such as Business & Management Studies and Medicine & Health Sciences. faqs.answer: GS Ayurveda Medical College and Hospital has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityUG DiplomaCandidate must have passed class 10+2 from the recognised board/council.B.A.M.S.Candidate shall have passed Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any recognised Board with Physics, Chemistry and Biology, and shall have obtained mentioned percentage taken together in Physics, Chemistry and Biology. In respect of persons with disability candidates, the minimum qualifying marks in the said examinations shall be 45% in case of General Category and 40% in the case of Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes. Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'. However, this has been a subject matter of challenge before the Hon'ble High Court of Delhi, Hon'ble High Court of Allahabad, Lucknow Bench, and Hon'ble High Court of Madhya Pradesh at Jabalpur Result awaited candidates can also apply. The lower age limit is 17 years on or before 31st Dec of the year of admission.

courses_data.description: Candidates interested in the fields related to Medicine & Health Sciences can enroll in theGS Ayurveda Medical College and Hospital B.A.M.S.programme, which lasts for 66 months. reviews.review_heading: Review of GS Ayurveda Medical College and Hospital.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good and nice. They are building a new hostel. They reconstructed the road. They have ample number of hostel, and they are increasing their class capacity. They made a huge canteen recently. They have a big cricket ground. There is one small ground.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the students and faculty members here.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has three people in a single room with an almirah, a chair, and a table with a Bed. The classroom is for a hundred students with Wi-Fi supplied. The library is also built greatly, having all books, especially Ayurvedic and modern aspects. They have all types.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and it is value for money.
reviews.review_text: The infra is good but they can do better. Playground area is very nice and the classes are good. But electricity is a problem here. Management is not good. But the teachers are helpful. Infra is average overall.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good for students who want to be BAMS graduates.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. It has almost all the facilities. All the departments have different laboratories with almost all the equipment. A central library, herbal garden, cricket ground, football ground, volleyball court, basketball court. etc., are well managed by the group.

review_content.Placements: MBBS, nursing, and PG courses are available here. After 4 and a half years of MBBS, we get to do an internship in the hospital. Lots of people studying here have already got PG seats. Any medical college would be the same if we're interested and have a zeal to go ahead.

review_content.Faculty: The faculty members are awesome. Everyone is a professional doctor. Everyone here is well-trained, and the hospital is well-equipped and well-designed. This is the main hospital in the district. Many people do come here in crowds. This hospital is always loaded with patients.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This is one of the best college in the state for MBBS.

content.Placements: It is a government college from Srikakulam. It contains a total of 200 seats. In 2025, it contained 150 seats. There are good packages in the government Hospital, and one can earn a good amount of pay in the future. There are only MBBS and nursing courses offered in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a good infrastructure, well-maintained rooms, classrooms, labs, libraries, etc. There is a basketball court in the college, and it has a good atmosphere. There is Wi-Fi available in our college, which is a better option for students who want to pursue the MBBS course.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, Has hospital with high outpatient, Infrastructure can be improved .

content.Placements: After MBBS, you can set up your own clinic or work in a private or government hospital and earn around forty thousand per month, or you can complete your postgraduation and earn more than 1 LPA. To enter postgraduation, one must give the NEET PG exam and qualify in it. The internship is in the same college in the 5th year, with a stipend of around twenty-five thousand.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good according to government standards. There are 5-6 lecture halls with power points, air conditioning, etc. Facilities in the college include separate classrooms for each department, and there is also a hospital. There is an inbuilt reading room and library in the college. In the hostel, facilities are also good. The food available in the mess is also good. There is an inbuilt reading room, gym, and recreation room in the hostel. There is a playground, basketball court, and tennis court available for students.

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 23380 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam MBBS cutoff 2025 was 23380 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 23851 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 116641 to 159325. According to this range, the most and least competitive courses are MD and MS, respectively. reviews.review_heading: This is one of the best college in the state for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure, well-maintained rooms, classrooms, labs, libraries, etc. There is a basketball court in the college, and it has a good atmosphere. There is Wi-Fi available in our college, which is a better option for students who want to pursue the MBBS course.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, Has hospital with high outpatient, Infrastructure can be improved .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good according to government standards. There are 5-6 lecture halls with power points, air conditioning, etc. Facilities in the college include separate classrooms for each department, and there is also a hospital. There is an inbuilt reading room and library in the college. In the hostel, facilities are also good. The food available in the mess is also good. There is an inbuilt reading room, gym, and recreation room in the hostel. There is a playground, basketball court, and t...

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are very bad faculty is good we can say.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not as expected, and we can even say it is bad. There is no Wi-Fi in the classrooms, and PowerPoint presentations don’t work effectively every time due to maintenance. Food is available in the mess, but it is not very good to eat. There is no canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Medical Sciences, Srikakulam.
reviews.review_text: A small ground is available with good hostel facilities. The basketball court is good. The mess is not at all okay. Srikakulam is a rural area compared to other districts of Andhra Pradesh.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good government medical college in Andhrapradesh.
reviews.review_text: The mess is fine. There are only two lecture halls for the whole college. There is a library. Sports and games are up to you. If we are interested, we have to buy all the equipment ourselves and play. College doesn't provide you with anything. There is no Wi-Fi in the college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college that can provide good education and ample opportunities to excel.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not of the highest pedigree, but good library and classrooms are there. More than sufficient books are available in the library. The books, journals are updated from time to time. Wi-Fi is not available. Labs are decent. Equipment is available to the required degree and with good quality. Quality of the facilities provided is decent. The quality of the food served is good but not great. Sports facilities are somewhat limited. There is no big ground to play ga...

reviews.review_heading: I studied for more than 5 years when I joined this college that time it was in developing stage.
reviews.review_text: Course of MBBS is good with well-educated and well-mannered professors. Wi-Fi is available in every department. Library is available for students to read in a peaceful environment. Canteen is also available. Hostel rooms is good with all facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I couldn't say bad or worse but it is good according to the knowledge or learning things
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very bad ..power points doesn't work sometimes according to NMC guidelines lecture hall should be with centralized air conditioning none of the room is with presence of air conditioning management doesn't even care about those kind of things

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with teachers and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available. Our classrooms are good. There is a library. The library atmosphere is peaceful. The quality of the food in the mess is not good. We have to eat at an outside canteen. Games are available, but there is no playground.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good for students who want to become good doctors.
reviews.review_text: The entire infrastructure and facilities of our college are very good. Wi-Fi facility is available in the library and labs, and classrooms are well-equipped with projectors, etc. High standard education is provided here. The anatomy dissection hall is one of the best places for students to learn.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching faculty members are excellent here.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are up to the mark here, and the food and the maintenance of hostels are well. They provide nutritious meals. Our college has a huge range of facilities like free Wi-Fi, etc. Classrooms and labs are maintained properly and contain all the data up to date.
