admission_overview.college_name: Periyar University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_overview.title: Periyar University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Periyar University offers degree, diploma, and certificate courses to candidates at UG, PG and PhD levels. Courses offered are in the streams of Humanities & Social Sciences, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Science, Business & Management Studies, Education, and Mass Communication & Media. Admission to the courses at Periyar University is merit or entrance-based, depending upon the applied course. It may be noted that the university also offers different UG and PG courses to candidates in distance education mode along with online courses. These courses are offered through the Periyar University Centre for Online and Distance Education (PUCODE).

eligibility_selection.title: Periyar University Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Periyar University conducts entrance exams to provide admission to candidates in a majority of UG and PG courses offered by it. The entrance test and admission process are carried out by the respective department of the university. Candidates seeking admission shall first check the eligibility conditions for the course before applying. Check below the eligibility, fee and selection criteria for the Periyar University course admissions 2025: Courses

courses_table.eligibility: Bachelor’s degree of a minimum of three-year duration with 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category students)
courses_table.selection_criteria: TANCET/ MAT/ CAT or Department of Management Studies Entrance Exam + GD + PI

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 in the respective subject from Tamilnadu Higher Secondary Board or any equivalent board
BSc or equivalent degree in the respective subjects from any university accepted by the syndicate
Masters or PG degree with at least 55% aggregate

faqs.answer: Students seeking Periyar University admissions must visit the official website and apprise themselves with the relevant information. Students must appear for the entrance exams that are prescribed for the particular course-specialization they are seeking.For example, for admissions into the sought-after MBA courses, students can appear for any of the prominent Management exams like CAT, MAT, CMAT, XAT, etc. Candidates may visit the official website to know more about other entrance exams like CUET, JEE, etc.
faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted by Periyar University?

admission_process.title: Periyar University Admissions Process 2025

paragraphs: All admissions to Periyar University are entrance-based and merit-based. Most UG, PG and doctoral courses have their own entrance exams. Some also accept state/national-level entrance scores. You can follow the steps below:

Periyar University Application Process 2025Applicants must go to the official site and complete the application form online. The documents required should be uploaded, and the application fee must be paid using the given payment gateway. The filled form should be printed out and saved to be referred to later.
Selection RoundsFor MBA, applicants are considered on the basis of TANCET, MAT, CAT or the Department of Management Studies exam and then GD and PI.

Release and Counselling of Merit ListPeriyar University publishes course-wise merit lists after the selection rounds. The shortlisted candidates have to attend the counselling process by the respective departments. The final seat assignment will be done after the candidates pay thePeriyar University admission feeand verify their documents.
Check out more details in the below video:
lists: BSc, MSc and Diploma are merit or university-based examinations
BCom, BCA, MA and PhD programmes are based on university entrance tests of their own

courses_data.name: Periyar University MSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Periyar University in Salem offers MSc courses with 18 specialisations, including those offered by affiliated colleges. Admission to the university's department and research studies center is through entrance exams, while merit determines admission to affiliated colleges.

faqs.question: How to apply for MSc at Periyar University?
faqs.answer: To apply for Periyar University MSc admission, the first step is to pass the eligibility criteria as per the university's norms. Aspirants who passed graduation in BCA/ BSc in Computer Science/ Information Technology/ Computer Technology/ Mathematics or any other equivalent degree in the respective subjects from any university accepted by Syndicate are eligible to apply for this course. faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Periyar University?
faqs.answer: For admission to the Periyar University MBA course, candidates are required to fulfil the basic qualification requirements for this course. Those who are willing to get admission to the PG level MBA (General) course at Periyar University must get a UG degree of three years of duration with minimum of 50% aggregate in any stream. There is a relaxation of 5% given to candidates belonging to reserved categories. These candidates are required to pass a UG degree with minimum aggregate of 45%. Furthe

faqs.question: What MBA programmes are offered by Periyar University?
faqs.answer: Periyar University provides a two-year full-time MBA programme via its Department of Management. The general MBA and an MBA in Export Management are provided by the university. The programmes are offered at the PG extension centre in Dharmapuri. Industry-relevant learning through AICTE accreditation is ensured by Periyar University.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for MBA at Periyar University?
faqs.answer: Admission into MBA in Periyar University is done based on entrance test marks and selection rounds. They should clear TANCET, MAT, CAT, or Periyar University entrance exam. Selected candidates are then further evaluated based on Group Discussions and Personal Interviews. Periyar University makes the final admission into MBA based on overall performance.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MBA at Periyar University?
faqs.answer: Periyar University asks the candidates to have a minimum bachelor's degree of three years duration. Students should have at least an aggregate of 50%, while reserved category students require 45%. In addition to the eligibility, candidates have to appear for the standardized entrance examinations. Periyar University makes sure that only suitable candidates are admitted to its MBA programme.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for Periyar University?
faqs.answer: The Periyar University admissions are based on applicants' merit, entrance exam score, academic records, fulfilment of eligibility criteria, and seat intake. Candidates are required to meet the course-specific minimum eligibility conditions and the selection criteria as well. Depending upon the applied course, further rounds of admissions are carried out. More details related to the Periyar University admission process are provided below:STEP 1: Periyar University Application Process 2025Candidates must fill an online application form with all the relevant details along with paying an application fee and submit the form at the Head Office of Periyar University.STEP 2: Periyar University Entrance ExamThere are different schools and departments in the university through which the courses are offered. Each department conducts an entrance test for UG/PG course admission. Candidates seeking admission have to appear for the test and score good marks to be eligible to take admission.STEP 3: S

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to Periyar University BSc course?
faqs.answer: No, Periyar University does not accept scores for any entrance exam. There is no entrance exam required for Periyar University BSc admission. The university offers direct admission to all BSc courses. Students can only pursue BSc at Periyar University's affiliated colleges. The selection criteria is common across all the affiliated colleges. For admission to BSc courses, candidates must fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. Direct admission is offered to such candidates. The university selects candidates based on their merit obtained in Class 12.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc at Periyar University?
faqs.answer: Those who get selected for BSc course at Periyar University for the respective specialisations are required to pay the fee at the time of admission. The tuition fee differs for each BSc specialisation. The lowest fee is INR 1,540, while the highest tuition fee is INR 45,000. This fee range contains the tuition fee for all the BSc specialisations offered at Periyar University's affiliated colleges. However, this fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Periyar University BSc fee.

The maximum TANCET cutoff required for admissions in the last round was 2436 for MBA/PGDM admission in the General category. Tabulated below is the TANCET first and last round cutoff 2025.

After comparing both the categories, the last Round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the OBC AI students.

highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is Periyar University. Numerous national ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #94 rank in the University category, and #40 under State Public University. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around Periyar University rankings.

rankings.highlight: 28th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025
8th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Tamil Nadu In 2025

nirf.description:
Periyar University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Periyar University fell 51 ranks to #151 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a fluctuating trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Periyar University fell 38 ranks to #94 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has shown a decreasing trend in the 'State Public University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Periyar University fell 15 ranks to #40 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the Periyar University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

data: Library, Cafeteria, Hostel, Sports Complex, Auditorium, Research centres, Medical services, etc.

sports.description: With equal emphasis on physical education and sports, the university has a dedicated sports department or complex. The university has a huge space for outdoor activities such as football, cricket, kho-kho, basketball courts (2000 sqm), badminton, etc. The university regularly organises the All India South Zone Level Kabaddi, Volleyball, Football, Basketball, and Handball tournaments. Activities available to students encompass indoor sports such as chess, table tennis, Ludo, yoga and many other worthwhile recreational choices. Besides, it also has a separate gymnasium with professional gym equipment.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Bharathiyar Arts and Science College for WomenReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is accessed with various resources, but it is not very satisfying.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are enabled with online learning tools for the active participation of students. Libraries are accessed with various digital and offline journals and books. It is also accessed with DELNET. The transport services are provided by them around areas of the district.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Vivekanandha College of Arts and Science For Women, Vivekanandha Educational Institutions for WomenReviewed on 20 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Guidance for MBA discipline in placements scored the least.
reviews.review_text: The college was exclusively built for women students and supported them with lower-fee structures, others were encouraged to join the college considering the safety measures insisted for women. The transport system was enabled with all safety measures and even fitted with GPS tracking.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by A.V.S College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 27 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good but average.
reviews.review_text: I think it is good compared to government colleges. The hostel is okay, but the food is the worst. The students and friends are very good and calm-minded, and you have to open up with them. Some students can be threatening, but you should not get involved in any type of fight.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Sona College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 22 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to learn and go.
reviews.review_text: They have a clean and green campus with a peaceful atmosphere. They have compatible sports activities. They have educational and non-educational clubs. The canteen food is good sometimes. The canteen is spacious and has a cool vibe. There is a ground to play. They have CCTV cameras everywhere. They have a safe hostel with an ambience of a home away from home. It is a ragging-free campus. It has an active entrepreneur development cell.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by KSR Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 7 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied, because the highest salary package is provided.
reviews.review_text: More than 100000 books are currently in my college library. In every single classroom, having a separate projector is very useful for easy learning. The hostel food is very hygienic. Weekly thrice non veg is provided. The college bus is free for all day scholars.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Shri Sakthikailassh Women's CollegeReviewed on 7 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The best college in the Salem district, which is very safe and secure for women.
reviews.review_text: Our college has more labs, Wi-Fi facilities, sports center, libraries, and a clean and neat canteen. The college environment is pleasant and clean, which gives us space. It has a smart class like a projector class and more than three seminar halls.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by KSR Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 10 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college is good for my career.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good in our hostel. Hostel food is good and hygienic. Wi-Fi is available. The library is available from 9am to 9 pm. The swimming pool is available for hostel students. Medical facilities are available at any emergency inside our college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by A.E.T. Arts and Science CollegeReviewed on 8 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Supportive faculty, decent facilities, and manageable academics.
reviews.review_text: A. E. T. Arts & Science College, Salem offers a well-equipped campus with facilities that support both academic and extracurricular activities. The college provides campus-wide Wi-Fi, two dedicated computer centers, two to three laboratories, and a well-stocked library for students' learning needs. Common spaces such as an auditorium, conference hall, and common rooms are available for academic programs and cultural events, while a sports complex and multiple playgrounds encourage physical activ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Thiruvalluvar Government Arts CollegeReviewed on 5 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good and it has good value for money.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good, but there is no availability of Wi-Fi on the campus. The library is good and has separate libraries for each department, as well as a large common library. The college has four hostels, two for boys and two for girls. The food is not very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Excel College for Commerce and Science, Excel Group InstitutionsReviewed on 1 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: There are air-conditioned classrooms available for all courses. The infrastructure of the college is fabulous. The quality of the hostels is excellent. They are very clean and have many plants. The mess food is delicious and also hygienic.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by KSR Educational InstitutionsReviewed on 17 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Actually satisfied because of some faculty, good placements in 2024, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Campus has pretty decent infrastructure. Classrooms are clean and have proper Wi-Fi and projectors. Labs are well-equipped, and the library is quiet with a good book collection. Hostels are comfortable, and Wi-Fi works fine. The mess food is okay, not great, but manageable. Sports facilities like basketball, football, and indoor games are available. Medical help is also there when needed. Overall, it's a good environment to study and live in.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by SSM College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 13 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I was dissatisfied with the infrastructure and the teaching.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was too poor, the building for the BBA was not fully completed, and the interior was not that great. Only the main building was well-maintained, and the building for the BBA course was not completely built. I hope they have fully completed it during the past year.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by M.G.R. CollegeReviewed on 13 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College for learning and opportunities.
reviews.review_text: College has good classroom facilities for every student. The college has 2 libraries where we can get many types of books. Also, the college has best labs with good systems for learning. The college has large grounds for 3 colleges for all types of games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Muthayammal College of Arts & ScienceReviewed on 22 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Decent academics, excellent labs, but can improve on campus life and events.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and smart classrooms are available, with high-speed Wi-Fi and smartboards, projectors, and seating. There are more than 5 advanced labs with over 250 computers licensed software like Python, Java, Oracle, MATLAB, and VMware. High-speed LAN & Wi-Fi connectivity is available. Hostel has spacious and well-ventilated rooms on a 2/3 sharing basis, 24/7 water and electricity with backup generators, and high-speed Wi-Fi in the hostel blocks. Wardens and security staff are available aroun...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Sri Ganesh College of Arts and ScienceReviewed on 18 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College was just for degree.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. The library was available for free for books. The classroom was large. The campus was beautiful and the garden was clean. Limited sports facilities were available. Basic medical facilities were available.

The college provides undergraduate courses in Physiotherapy, including the 4.5-year BPT programme.

Silver Oak College of Physiotherapy admissionto all the courses is based on the score of the last qualifying exam. Admission to all the courses at Silver Oak College of Physiotherapy is open. Silver Oak College of Physiotherapy admission process 2024begins with the application process. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through E-mail or submitted in person at the Department of Silver Oak College of Physiotherapy admission. Step 2: Selection Rounds
Admission to all the UG courses at Silver Oak College of Physiotherapy admission is direct. Candidates are selected based on merit scores obtained in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment
After filling out all the selection rounds, candidates have to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seats.

college_info.intro:
Punjab Agricultural University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech students are placed in top companies such as Amul, Nestle, PepsiCo, and others. Engineering students are trained on modern machinery and technology. For MBA students, there are special sessions conducted so as to enhance the communication and presentation skills of students. The university has 18 Krishi Vigyan Kendras (KVKs) in several districts. PAU Ludhiana also extends services to farmers through its 14 Farmers' Advisory Service Centres (FASCs) located in districts such as Ferozepur, Gurdaspur, Hoshiarpur, Noor Mahal (Jalandhar), Kapurthala, and others.
Overall, Ludhiana University is one of the highest-ranked universities in India. PAU Ludhiana BTech and MBA students can also go for further education or can directly enter in corporate world. The opportunities available for PAU Ludhiana students are infinite. Below mentioned are some of the PAU Ludhiana courses and their respective eligibility and PAU Ludhian fee structure:

placements.overview: PAU Ludhiana placements 2026 will be updated here once out. According to the report 81 UG 4 year students were placed out of the total 290 graduated students during Punjab Agricultural University placements 2024 with a median package of INR 4.8 LPA. In UG 6 year program, 22 students of the batch 2024 got placements with a median salary of INR 4.8 LPA. According to the Punjab Agricultural University NIRF report 2025, the key highlights of 2024 as compared with 2023 are presented below:

In Punjab Agricultural University top reputated companies visted like Amul, nestle, Mahindra, nutrela company, and many more. College past records is also amazing you can check on college's official website.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied hostels but the great campus life and placement at PAU.

review_content.Placements: Getting placed here is quite easy due to the strong alumni network within the university. The seniors are very helpful, and there are no issues with ego among them. Alumni of PAU are spread across top universities around the globe and are eager to offer assistance.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure of the institution is good, but the hostels are in poor condition. Some renovation work has now been initiated, so we hope for improvements soon. The Wi-Fi system functions well, classes are engaging, and the mess food is satisfactory—there have been no issues in that regard. Additionally, the sports facilities are excellent.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements in 2023, highly cooperative faculty.

review_content.Placements: Around 70-80% of students are placed each year. Companies like Mahindra and Mahindra, TAFE, CLAAS, John Deere, and other companies are invited every year for the on-campus placements. The students are shortlisted based on merit. The average package offered by companies is 6 lakhs per annum, and the highest package was offered by John Deere, starting at 15 lakhs per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus has Wi-Fi in the library and other academic buildings. The infrastructure of the college is not very complex; a simple building consists of classrooms and labs in the UG building, while the PG building has all the teacher cabins. I am a day scholar, but the hostels have rooms in considerably poor condition, and the washrooms seriously need renovation.

review_summary.college_name: PAU Ludhiana Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture (6 years) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Fully satisfactory university.

content.Placements: There are almost 200 seats at PAU for B.Sc. (Hons) agriculture 2+4 years. This is the best university for agriculture students. It also offers good packages as the persons in my known are well settled in America, Canada, and they are earning good around 100000 $.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available but the some hostel which is given to first year students is average, and that hostel has 3S rooms. But in second year another hostel is allotted to students, and that are too good than that of 1st year, and that hostel has big rooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Horticulture - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: PAU is full of opportunities and research.

content.Placements: There are not many options after a B.Sc. (Hons.) in Horticulture, and we can either study further, or we can prepare for job exams. The scope is very prominent in horticulture but placements are very low as there are not many jobs for B.Sc in Horticulture. We have to do a master's degree in order to get a job.
content.Infrastructure: The university is very big and it comprises many different colleges. The campus is spread over 1,600 acers. Classrooms are also fully furnished and all studies are done by projector PPT based. It has one of the biggest libraries in Punjab. Hostels are in liveable conditions and not very lavish.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied hostels but the great campus life and placement at PAU.

content.Placements: Getting placed here is quite easy due to the strong alumni network within the university. The seniors are very helpful, and there are no issues with ego among them. Alumni of PAU are spread across top universities around the globe and are eager to offer assistance.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure of the institution is good, but the hostels are in poor condition. Some renovation work has now been initiated, so we hope for improvements soon. The Wi-Fi system functions well, classes are engaging, and the mess food is satisfactory—there have been no issues in that regard. Additionally, the sports facilities are excellent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in 2023, highly cooperative faculty.

content.Placements: Around 70-80% of students are placed each year. Companies like Mahindra and Mahindra, TAFE, CLAAS, John Deere, and other companies are invited every year for the on-campus placements. The students are shortlisted based on merit. The average package offered by companies is 6 lakhs per annum, and the highest package was offered by John Deere, starting at 15 lakhs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has Wi-Fi in the library and other academic buildings. The infrastructure of the college is not very complex; a simple building consists of classrooms and labs in the UG building, while the PG building has all the teacher cabins. I am a day scholar, but the hostels have rooms in considerably poor condition, and the washrooms seriously need renovation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Everything about the College of Agricultural Engineering and PAU is positive.

content.Placements: Placements are really good here. If you have scored a good CGPA or even less, they will provide you placements if you don't want to continue your studies further. About 35 students get placed every year among 80 because others continue their studies in M.Tech.
content.Infrastructure: The hostels are really not good, but the mess food is awesome. Classes are good, but in summer they are exhausting because they don’t have AC in the classrooms. Otherwise, there is a problem of leakage in some classes. Some creativity is also shown in the classrooms as the infrastructure is unique.

admission_overview.college_name: PAU Ludhiana Admission 2025: Eligibility, Application, Seats, Fees & Last Dates

admission_process.title: Punjab Agricultural University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Punjab Agricultural University admissionis a mix of merit and entrance basis. It is one of the pioneer agricultural universities and hence the competition for admission is ever increasing too. Interested students must clear the admission criteria of the desired course before applying. The application process at the university is usually conducted online Also known asPAU, the university offers undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma programmes in the fields ofAgriculture,Science,Engineering,Design, etc. Candidates need to appear for either the university-level entrance or provide valid scores of any other exams.
PAU Eligibility and Selection Criteria 2025

PAU Ludhiana course admissionis primarily entrance-based. Students must either appear for the exam conducted by the university or provide valid scores of any of the accepted exams. Further, clearing the basic eligibility is also required. The university accepts several national-level exams, such as CUET, ICAR AIEEA, etc., in addition to conducting its own entrance test. Students may need to participate in counselling for seat allotment. Interested students can check out the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria forPunjab Agricultural University courses:

PAU Ludhiana feesvary depending on the course and specialisation selected by the students. The university charges multiple components, such as admission fees, tuition fees, examination fees, university library fees, book bank fund, and more. Some of these components are charged only once at the time of admission, while the remaining need to be paid either per semester or yearly as per the university's guidelines. The fee structure at the time of admission will remain constant throughout the entire course duration. Find below thePunjab Agricultural University feesfor some of its popular programmes:
Note: This information is taken from official sources and is subject to change.

Punjab Agricultural University offers a good number of seats. The intake differs depending on the course and specialisation. Further, students need to participate in the counselling process conducted by the university for seat allotment. Below is PAU seat intake:-
Note: This information is taken from official sources and is subject to change.

PAU has certain no. of seats reserved for candidates from some categories. Students need to submit the required documents to verify their claim. Find below thePunjab Agricultural University seat reservation:
Note: This information is taken from official sources and is subject to change.
The admission process commences online. Interested students can follow the steps explained below to know about thePAU Ludhiana admission process:
1: Application Process

Interested students can apply for the desired course on the university's website. As admissions for most of the programmes are entrance-based, aspirants need to university's entrance by filling out the online application form. To submit the form, students must pay the application/ entrance exam fees.
2: Selection Process

Students are selected based on certain entrance exam scores, past academic performance, and more. For UG, PG, and PhD admissions, students are selected based on entrance exam scores. The university accepts BSET, AAT, ICAR AIEEA, and other national-level entrance exams.
3: Admission Confirmation
Students need to participate in the counselling process conducted by the university and go through document verification. For final confirmation, admission fees need to be paid.

For any questions students can reach out to the university's admission help desk.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to Punjab Agricultural University?
faqs.answer: PAU Ludhiana admission is done on the basis of clearance of the preset admission criteria. As admissions to most of the courses are entrance-based, students have to clear the accepted exam. Students are shortlisted based on multiple factors, such as entrance exam scores, past academic performance, and more. For UG, PG, and PhD admissions, students are selected based on entrance exam scores. The university accepts BSET, AAT, ICAR AIEEA, and other national-level entrance exams. Seat allotment is done through university's counselling process. For final confirmation, admission fees need to be paid.

placement_report.college_name: PAU Ludhiana Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package & Top Companies

placement_data.title: Punjab Agricultural University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Punjab Agricultural University has not released the placement details for the Class of 2025. The University has released the NIRF report 2025 which includes the placement details for batch 2024. According to the report, 81 UG 4 year students were placed out of the total 290 graduated students during Punjab Agricultural University placements 2024 with a median package of INR 4.8 LPA . In UG 6-year program, 22 students of the batch 2024 got placements with a median salary of INR 4.8 LPA.

In PG 2 year program , 135 students of batch 2024 were placed with a median salary of INR 4.8 LPA. Further, 6 students from the PG 5 year batch 2024 secured placements with the median salary of INR 4.8 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of Punjab Agricultural University in the recent past include Nestle, Amul, John Deere, Mahindra, TCS, etc.

College past records is also amazing you can check on college's official website.

In 2020 median package is 3.2 LPA, 2021 is 2.6 LPA, and median package of 2022 is 3.5 LPA. nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, Punjab Agricultural University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have dropped in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2025, Punjab Agricultural University fell 1 rank to #81 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a decreasing trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Punjab Agricultural University fell 7 ranks to #64 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It can be seen that; in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Punjab Agricultural University climbed 2 ranks to #28 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when compared with previous year's ranking. In 2025, Punjab Agricultural University's rank is #3, the same as last year's rank in the 'Agriculture and Allied Sectors' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

college_info.college_name: PAU Ludhiana

data.description: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) is a state agricultural university located in Ludhiana district of Punjab, India. The main campus of the university covers an area of 1510 acres, while the regional research stations cover a total of 4615 acres. The campus is situated on the Ludhiana - Ferozepur Road and is well connected by road and rail links. The university was established in 1962 to serve the state of erstwhile Punjab and was inaugurated by Pt. Jawahar Lal Nehru, Prime Minister of India on July 8,  1963. PAU was declared the Best Agricultural University in India in 1995 because of its outstanding achievements in agricultural research, education, and extension. The university offers various courses in agriculture, biotechnology, food science, and technology, among others. The university also holds a two-day main fair event where farmers from not only Punjab but also from neighboring states such as Haryana, Rajasthan, Himachal Pradesh, etc.etera travel to PAU campus to buy high-quality seeds, farm equipment, and gain knowledge on new agricultural technologies. PAU has a multi-purpose stadium located on the campus

review_content.Placements: Totally 199 students were placed in this college from our batch. The highest package rate was 1.2 crore, and the lowest was 80 Lacs. individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for studies. It won't support sports, which is a problem Faculty is very good.

content.Placements: In the case of MBBS, everyone will get a job in the future for sure. Usually, after MBBS, everyone will pursue higher studies like MD and MS, which will fetch us more money. What is to be understood is that MBBS is a complete money-making course.
content.Infrastructure: Few buildings are old, and few are new ones. New ones are really good, but old ones need renovation. Ground is there, but they are not well-maintained. There is no indoor stadium. Nature around the campus is great. The city is a really good place to hang out with friends.

individual_reviews.title: If you are really willing to work hard, you can join this college and make your dreams come true.

content.Placements: Many students gain admission to central medical colleges for postgraduate studies. They do not offer any stipend during internships, which may start this year, but the patient load is good, allowing one to learn about different cases. During the internship, you will be posted at various government primary health centers, and the workload is moderate.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the medical college is adequate, and the hostel is quite spacious with good security. The mess food is decent, but there is no proper canteen, and the college is far from the city. One should not expect top-notch hygiene in the mess. There isn’t a proper sports ground, as the focus is primarily on academic studies.

hostel_campus.college_name: Subbaiah Institute of Medical Science Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for studies. It won't support sports, which is a problem Faculty is very good.
reviews.review_text: Few buildings are old, and few are new ones. New ones are really good, but old ones need renovation. Ground is there, but they are not well-maintained. There is no indoor stadium. Nature around the campus is great. The city is a really good place to hang out with friends.

reviews.review_heading: If you are really willing to work hard, you can join this college and make your dreams come true.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the medical college is adequate, and the hostel is quite spacious with good security. The mess food is decent, but there is no proper canteen, and the college is far from the city. One should not expect top-notch hygiene in the mess. There isn’t a proper sports ground, as the focus is primarily on academic studies.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with my college as there are no opportunities for sports.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure with AC classrooms but the issue is no proper canteen facilities for students. Hostel facilities with room sharing of 3 people. Food provided by the mess is sometimes good and sometimes the worst. It is not worth the money we pay for a mess at the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching faculty is really good. View from college is also mesmerizing.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities, laundry, mess, gym, playground are up to mark. Hostel is maintained well with proper cleanliness and hygiene. In each hostel room there will be 3 members with 3 study tables and separate wardrobes. Geysers are there in every room. Drinking water facility is there in each floor.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, average infrastructure, and moderate patient loads.
reviews.review_text: Overall, it is average. Labs are good. Lecture halls are good. Hospital infra is average.  Hostel is average. Mess is average. Food is average. Poor playground. Average to good medical facilities. No Wi-Fi in hostel. Quality of food depends. Gym is good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the dean; too much torture with attendance.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is still growing. No wifi here.
Good food is available in the canteen. There are no such sports activities, as the dean isn't interested in anything. The hostel is fine and well maintained, but they simply take money for the skill lab just to show off, and they never teach anything there.

reviews.review_heading: Waste of money. Big time no
reviews.review_text: College is growing day by day, they r buying new new equipments. But they torture students so much. They purposefully put extension for interns. Mess food is not good and no fridge. Only 1 fridge for 1 entire hostel sometimes they get damaged & they delay repairing

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best resources, a good infrastructure and a decent curriculum.
reviews.review_text: It's the best campus I have ever seen. Our OT is the best in our college. We have well-equipped labs and a diagnostic center too. We have a lift facility too for people who can't take stairs and have a protective campus also. We have a good environment too.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty, and our college has all the facilities.
reviews.review_text: The hostel rooms are well maintained. There are all the facilities in the hostel room. The hostel is really safe to stay in and there is washroom on every room which is maintained neatly by the cleaning staff. No disturbances and the rooms are repainted and renovated every now and then.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty. Poor infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The library is not very large and does not provide Wi-Fi for students. Classrooms are fully furnished and air-conditioned. The canteen is often crowded, and the sports opportunities are significantly less than expected, as there is no sports ground; nonetheless, the labs are clean, while the washrooms are not well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Studies are good, but no playgrounds. The infrastructure is bad.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are air-conditioned, but there are no sports facilities or Wi-Fi in the hostels, which are poorly maintained. A festival is held once a year, but there are no other programs organized by the college. Although there is a research club, parking is still unavailable, and the college does not offer stipends for internships or any sporting facilities.

review_summary.college_name: Girijananda Chowdhury University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure, facilities, and faculty members are good. Totally the college is worth it.

content.Placements: 75-80% of students get placed in my course. The highest salary is 8 LPA, the average is 6 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. Top companies include Flipkart, Amazon, TCS, etc. Our college itself offers an internship called the Summer Internship Programme. Top roles include manager, researcher, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and environment of our college is good. Labs are well maintained, and classrooms are equipped with good facilities. The library is well maintained and has all books required by students. The quality of the hostel facilities and the food is good to eat. Different meals are provided every day, and they are worth eating. The canteen is also large and offers a variety of food items at affordable prices. The college also gives importance to medical facilities, sports, and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty and worth experiencing a college life here.

content.Placements: 30% of students were placed until March and many more companies are yet to come. The highest was 7 LPA, the lowest was 3.5 LPA, and the average is around 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include construction companies like RDC concrete, Taj Cement, Patel Engineering, etc. Till now, no one has gotten an internship from our course in any company. The top role offered in our course is Graduate Engineer Trainee.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is available, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries. The quality of the food is not good but the hostel offers Wi-Fi and minimal but good furniture for accommodation. Hostel rooms are not so good. Indoor and outdoor stadiums are available and a gym with proper equipment is also available.

content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got placed in our course. Top recruiting companies are Vodafone and Jio. Our college provides better placements compared to private colleges. This college is a part of the new revolution. They are building new careers.

The equipments are up to date. Classrooms are smart. AICTE lab was newly formed. The library contains all the books and materials. Classrooms are well-maintained.

individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good teachers and placements.

content.Placements: Almost 50% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 1.8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are very clean and well-maintained. Wi-Fi connection is also enabled. There are many libraries with air-conditioner and non-air-conditioner facilities. Hostels are good and affordable for students. The food quality is also good according to the prices.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college and provides good placements.

content.Infrastructure: Our college has very good laboratory facilities. Classrooms are not up to the mark but this college has very good library facilities. The quality of food served in the canteen is very poor. Medical facilities are not good. Management should improve the quality of the college in the future.

admission_process.title: Girijananda Chowdhury University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Girijananda Chowdhury University admission 2025is open for allUG, PG, doctoral, and Diploma courses. Admission to the university is merit-based.Girijananda Chowdhury Universityoffers various courses in the fields ofEngineering, Management, Commerce, and Pharmacyamong others such asBTech, MBA, MTech, etc. Candidates willing to apply forGirijananda Chowdhury University admission 2025are required to apply online by visiting the university's official website. If you want to know more about theGirijananda Chowdhury University admission process for 2025read below:
Girijananda Chowdhury University Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection

Girijananda Chowdhury University admissionto all the courses is merit-based. The university offers anonline mode of application. Candidates seeking admission to any courses are required to apply by visiting the university's official website. Candidates seeking admission to Girijananda Chowdhury University can check out the updated information related toGirijananda Chowdhury University coursesalong with selection criteria in the following table:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects with 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category)
Merit-Based
Graduation with minimum 50% marks (45% for reserved category)
Merit-Based
Merit-Based
Passed graduation examination in Math Stream with minimum 50% marks (45% for reserved category)
Merit-Based
Merit-Based
Steps forGirijananda Chowdhury University Admission Process2025
Girijananda Chowdhury University's admissionprocessincludes filling out the application form and qualifying for the selection rounds.
Check below the detailed steps ofGirijananda Chowdhury University admission admission 2025:
Step1: Girijananda Chowdhury UniversityApplication Process 2025
Candidates are required to fill out the basic eligibility criteria for all the courses, candidates need to fill out theapplication form online.
Step 2: Girijananda Chowdhury University Selection Round
Girijananda Chowdhury University selects candidates for some UG and diploma courses based on the last qualifying entrance exam score.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
The candidates selected for the course must complete their enrollment by submitting the seat booking amount within the given deadline. In the end candidates have to pay thefinal fee.

courses_data.name: Girijananda Chowdhury University MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The MBA course offered by Girijananda Chowdhury University is a postgraduate merit course with a graduation requirement of minimum 50% (45% for reserved). It emphasizes managerial, leadership, and business aptitude to ready students for professional and entrepreneurial professions. Admission would be on a merit basis from academic performance and would require one to apply through the official site of the university.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Girijananda Chowdhury University for MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes, direct entry is available for the MBA programme at  Girijananda Chowdhury University. Candidates need to have 50% or more marks in graduation (45% for the reserved categories). Admission is through merit, and no entrance examination is needed. Suitable candidates may apply online using the university portal.

courses_data.name: Girijananda Chowdhury University MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The MBA course offered by Girijananda Chowdhury University is a postgraduate merit course with a graduation requirement of minimum 50% (45% for reserved). It emphasizes managerial, leadership, and business aptitude to ready students for professional and entrepreneurial professions. Admission would be on a merit basis from academic performance and would require one to apply through the official site of the university.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Girijananda Chowdhury University for MBA?
faqs.answer: Yes, direct entry is available for the MBA programme at  Girijananda Chowdhury University. Candidates need to have 50% or more marks in graduation (45% for the reserved categories). Admission is through merit, and no entrance examination is needed. Suitable candidates may apply online using the university portal.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at Girijananda Chowdhury University?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for BTech at Girijananda Chowdhury University is to pass Class 12 with at least 45% aggregate marks from a recognised board or have passed the DVoc stream in the same or allied sector. Admission to the BTech course is based on merit scores. Apart from this, courses such as BTech Lateral and BTech for working professionals are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure, facilities, and faculty members are good. Totally the college is worth it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and environment of our college is good. Labs are well maintained, and classrooms are equipped with good facilities. The library is well maintained and has all books required by students. The quality of the hostel facilities and the food is good to eat. Different meals are provided every day, and they are worth eating. The canteen is also large and offers a variety of food items at affordable prices. The college also gives importance to medical facilities, sports, and games.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty and worth experiencing a college life here.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries. The quality of the food is not good but the hostel offers Wi-Fi and minimal but good furniture for accommodation. Hostel rooms are not so good. Indoor and outdoor stadiums are available and a gym with proper equipment is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Girijananda Chowdhury Institute of Management and Technology, Guwahati.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. All the required study materials and labs are provided in our college. They are accessible to the students. The equipments are up to date. Classrooms are smart. AICTE lab was newly formed. The library contains all the books and materials. Classrooms are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good teachers and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are very clean and well-maintained. Wi-Fi connection is also enabled. There are many libraries with air-conditioner and non-air-conditioner facilities. Hostels are good and affordable for students. The food quality is also good according to the prices.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college and provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has very good laboratory facilities. Classrooms are not up to the mark but this college has very good library facilities. The quality of food served in the canteen is very poor. Medical facilities are not good. Management should improve the quality of the college in the future.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are the best part of the college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good and spacious with ample amount of sunlight coming in. All the facilities are nice. Washrooms are clean. Computer labs are available with free Wi-Fi access and clean drinking water. Hostel rooms are clean and spacious and the food in the canteen is nice.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Girijananda Chowdhury Institute of Management and Technology, Guwahati.
reviews.review_text: We have a Wi-Fi facility with good internet speed. There are 6 laboratories, and each laboratory has Wi-Fi, printers, and a scanner. There is a server room that handles all machines that are available in 6 laboratories. It also provides a library. Projector facility is also available for presentations, workshops, and seminars. In this college, hostel facility is not available. But we have a great canteen. Our campus is also good.

reviews.review_heading: I am very dissatisfied with campus life, crowd, high fee, and worse value for money.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure consists of an average library, average labs, below-average classrooms, and no Wi-Fi. Hostel is the worst. Mess and canteen are horrible. Medical facilities are below average. Sports and games are not given much importance.

reviews.review_heading: Friendly college with friendly staff.
reviews.review_text: The computer lab is big and fully air conditioned throughout the summer days. Wi-Fi connection is also available on the college campus with decent speeds. The library is also air-conditioned with a digital space available to browse the internet or do work. The food provided by the canteen is decent and cheap as well with a wide variety of beverage options available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college to pursue a course at an affordable budget.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a well-equipped library, good campus, well-equipped labs, good faculty members, a huge canteen, playground, gymnasium, recreation areas, etc. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and there are two huge well-equipped auditoriums, which have an accommodation capacity of 300-400 people. Hostels are also well-equipped and have all the necessary amenities. The quality of the food served is also good, whether be in the hostel or canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Great college, if you're not too high on expectations.
reviews.review_text:
1. Labs are adequate for Mechanical department. Have almost all the machines. Huge library with over 5k books. Wi-Fi campus, but not the fastest. Classroom with smart boards, but lacks AC. 
2. Both Girls and boys hostel in-campus. Nursing room, ambulance etc. Available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Classroom conditions are good. Good lab, library facilities are there also. The canteen food is not so bad. Boys and girls hostel is inside the college campus. Other facilities like the gym, playground are provided by the college. The atmosphere inside the college campus is helpful for students.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the facilities.
reviews.review_text:
The College is near the "Dipor bil" ( bird sanctuary of Assam) Azara, Guwahati. The main building is divided into 5 floors. The first floor comprise of Mechanical branch and lab. 
2nd floor electrical and electronic branch and lab. 
3rd floor computer Science
4th floor applied electronics and instrumentation. 
5th floor consist of AEI lab and auditorium. 
2nd building consist of admission cell, library. Boys and girls hostel are in campus. 
In the backyard of main building, playground and gym ar...

reviews.review_heading: The best private college in Assam in terms of faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. We have well-maintained labs with air-conditioners, Wi-Fi facilities, a sickbay, and a conference hall. There are two lifts in the main building and one in the administrative building. The canteen of our college is huge and has a seating capacity of around 200 students at a time. There is also a pharmacy on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college among private institutions.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the Wi-Fi facility. Almost all classrooms are equipped with projectors. Labs are well-equipped. Quality of food served in the canteen is average. However, there are lots of food options available outside the college. Library also has a good collection of books.
